description: Personal finance review: a savings transfer amount (PROBED_LATER), a standing formatting preference (STANDING_PREF), a subscription price that gets corrected (SUPERSEDED), and filler chit-chat.

turns.text: Set up the auto-transfer to savings, it's 620 dollars on the first of every month now.
620 dollars monthly to savings, first of the month, logged.
Standing thing for any numbers you give me on money stuff: always show the annual total too, not just monthly, I think better in yearly terms.
Understood, I'll always pair a monthly figure with its annual total from here on.
That streaming bundle we added is 24.99 a month, more than I remembered.
24.99 a month for the bundle, noted, that adds up over a year.
My phone case cracked again, third one this year, might just get a case-less life.
Living dangerously, but bold. At least screen glass has gotten tougher.
Correction on the streaming bundle, they had a promo I forgot about, it's actually 17.99 a month for the first year.
Better, 17.99 a month for year one, updated.
Grabbed lunch with an old coworker today, hadn't caught up in ages.
Those catch-ups are always better than expected once you actually do them.
Car made a weird noise on the highway, probably nothing, probably not nothing.
The classic Schrodinger's car noise, worth a mechanic look before it decides for you.
Finally organized the garage, found tools I forgot I owned.
A rediscovered tool collection is basically a free trip to the hardware store.
Neighbor's having a yard sale this weekend, might swing by out of curiosity.
Yard sales are 90 percent looking, 10 percent buying, a good low-stakes Saturday.
What's the actual monthly cost of that streaming bundle right now?
17.99 a month for the first year.
Remind me what I set the savings auto-transfer to?
620 dollars a month.
How much am I putting toward savings this year in total?

probes.question: What's the actual monthly cost of that streaming bundle right now?
Remind me what I set the savings auto-transfer to?
How much am I putting toward savings this year in total?
